AFFECT [[6163493716185020606]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[15747212579093637659]] > [[5879107708014023863]][.[[233748328658231]]=[[6504254477.1343967321191992457]]]
LOCATE AFTER ALL INSERT { ~&383135108587212173&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&4100702871256454852&~("buttonSkipMenu") } 
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[13004069142833447376]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
REBUILD [[7713401573498017]]
LOCATE BEFORE STREAM | ~&6504254477&~.~&233746086014973&~ |
INSERT {
        ~&5972376&~(~&233746086014973&~==="buttonSkipMenu") {
	    ~&6504254477&~.~&233735394140446&~.~&4738666142840689386&~(~&16993119679864235644&~, "Finished");
            ~&6504254477&~.~&2766288418351025740&~.~&214622501183&~();
            ~&7083121450889&~;
        }
}
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#createCollection
LOCATE BEFORE ALL
REPLACE collectionName WITH { collectionName: "Finished" }
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
